keyPoints: Prioritize prompts that force active credibility evaluation (cite sources, rate confidence, assess bias) as the chapter’s central design lever.
Mandate explicit source citations and provenance verification for AI-generated claims.
Embed credibility prompts within auditable workflows aligned with reporting standards and governance tools (PRISMA/ROSES/PROBAST+AI).
Pair credibility prompts with retrieval-grounded checks and uncertainty signaling to anchor claims in verifiable evidence.
Design robust evaluation plans using calibration metrics (ECE, reliability curves, Brier score) and misjudgment rates, with preregistered protocols.
Maintain strong human‑in‑the‑loop validation and user training to mitigate over-trust and exploit domain expertise.
Acknowledge domain-specific limits and avoid universal claims while prioritizing transparent reporting and cross-domain testing.
